description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton with a predominantly red and white color scheme, featuring the brand name 'BRAVO' in large, bold white letters on the front. The packaging displays images of apples, mangoes, and passionfruit slices, visually indicating the juice flavor. The carton has a screw cap located at the top corner, which is cream-colored and slightly angled. The front panel includes additional text in Swedish, such as 'ÄPPLE, MANGO & PUMPAJUICE' and '100% fruit', along with a green circular badge. The sides of the carton show more fruit imagery and some small text, while the top is a solid pink with the cap and a round cream-colored seal. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A rectangular BRAVO juice carton with bold red and white branding, fruit imagery, and a cream screw cap on top. The packaging features apple, mango, and passionfruit illustrations and clear product labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the BRAVO brand, fruit images, and main product text with the cap visible on top.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the screw cap's position and the continuation of fruit imagery around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly pink top and less visible branding, focusing on the back panel of the carton.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the screw cap and the side fruit graphics, mirroring view 1.
